use_cases: Displaying status indicators like active, pending, or closed states on items
Labeling content categories or topics with colored tags
Showing feature flags or beta badges on product cards
Indicating notification counts or new item markers
Marking items with relevant keywords or filters in lists
ai_summary: A lightweight badge component from shadcn/ui that renders inline status labels and tags with variant styling via class-variance-authority. Supports default, secondary, destructive, and outline variants with rounded pill styling. Designed as a reusable atomic component for labeling content, showing status, or highlighting features across any interface.
